headline: How Low Can Home Depot Stock Go?
summary: To accurately assess risk, investors must look at how an asset behaves when the system breaks. In the 15 major market dislocations since it began trading, Home Depot (NYSE: HD) has averaged a -17% contraction, compared to the S&P 500's -16% drop.

headline: Is Home Depot's Interconnected Retail Strategy Paying Off?
summary: HD's interconnected retail push is lifting sales and fueling double-digit online growth despite a challenged home improvement market.

headline: From Brooklyn to Tens of Thousands of Retail Doors: How Mitch Gould Rewrote the Rules of American Distribution
summary: The creator of the Evolution of Distribution™ and author of The Blonde, the Ferrari, and the Kwan reveals the strategy behind placing health and wellness brands in Home Depot, Lowe's, Walmart, Costco, Walgreens, CVS, GNC, 7-Eleven, and Amazon ...

headline: Why Did BSX, LOW, CAG Fall To 52-Week Lows Today?
summary: Boston Scientific was down about 0.7% at close, while Lowe's Companies ended the session 3% lower, and Conagra Brands fell by about 1.3%.
